title: A Christmas Tale
description: A Christmas Tale is a mod themed about Christmas and all the magic that surrounds it
body:
![A Christmas Tale banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/49e331eda2ea616572fb310b5f08929aa8e483e1.png)

This mod is aimed at adding new features which are christmas themed.


This mod is still in development, so feedback is appreciated :)


## Dependencies
- Fabric API
- Terrablender

## Caracteristics
- **New core item** : Stellar Heart, an item that contain the spirit of Christmas.
- **New items** : Food, items, weapons and more!
- **French & English langage support**
